sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42104" key="e)pwfe/limos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπωφέλ-ιμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n42104.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπωφελής, ἔργα</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Carm.Aur.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
